cols.name: Board width
cols.description: Number of columns in the play well.

rows.name: Board height
rows.description: Number of rows in the play well.

pass_lines.name: Lines to verify
pass_lines.description: Lines a visitor must clear to pass. The captcha is satisfied the moment this many lines are cleared.

gravity.name: Fall speed
gravity.description: Ticks the piece takes to fall one cell. Higher means slower; a hard drop places it instantly either way.

lock_delay.name: Lock delay
lock_delay.description: Ticks a resting piece waits before it locks, giving time for a last slide or rotate.

sound.name: Sound effects
sound.description: Play subtle sound effects (piece lock, line clear, verified, top-out). Visitors can always mute in-game.
